characters.appearance: A human right hand with a light complexion. The fingers are slender with short, clean, unpainted fingernails.
characters.wardrobe: Not applicable; only the hand is visible.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise, pointing and tapping on specific areas of the screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: English बोलने में घबराहट होती है? Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Nervous about speaking English? Practice daily with Supernova.]

Unknown speaker says: Good morning, please take a seat. [Good morning, please take a seat.]

Unknown speaker says: बस मुश्किल शब्दों पर tap करो और उनका सही मतलब समझो। [Just tap on difficult words and understand their correct meaning.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common pain point (nervousness speaking English) in a warm, encouraging tone.
- Replaces the original's fictional story with a practical, real-world interview scenario suitable for working adults.
- Demonstrates the core app feature (tap to translate) while establishing Supernova as a helpful guide.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova के साथ रोज़ 10 मिनट में इंग्लिश बोलना सीखें
AI Tutor के साथ अभ्यास करें
पढ़ें
सुनें
बोलें
+150 नए शब्द रोज़
"Good morning, please take a seat. There is nothing here to be nervous about."
"Thank you... how should I start?" I asked, hesitating.
I stood before the manager in silence, my palms sweating and my heart beating faster than ever before.
Though I could not yet speak fluently, I felt that with daily practice, a new door—far more promising—was opening.
nervous
घबराहट
मुझे पता है
सीखना है

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: I asked, hesitating. [I asked, hesitating.]

Unknown speaker says: to hesitate [to hesitate]

Unknown speaker says: I stood before the manager in silence... [I stood before the manager in silence...]

Unknown speaker says: Office हो या interview, real-world situations के लिए खुद को तैयार करो। [Whether it's an office or an interview, prepare yourself for real-world situations.]

Unknown speaker says: fluently [fluently]

Unknown speaker says: रोज़ 10 मिनट दो, और बिना डरे English बोलो! [Give 10 minutes daily, and speak English without fear!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Continues demonstrating the vocabulary and pronunciation features of the app.
- Reinforces Supernova's value proposition: preparing users for real-world speaking situations like office conversations and interviews.
- Ends with a strong, empowering call-to-action to build confidence through daily 10-minute practice.
